summary: Plan-only remediation assessment for five open PR inventory candidates. No GitHub mutations are planned because the job blocks comments/labels/closures and no PR has complete merge preflight proof.

repair_candidate.summary: Repair useful contributor PRs in-place where possible; do not open a replacement PR until validation and Codex /review pass. The highest-priority executable repairs are #55851 review findings, #64503 Teams proof/semantics/rebase, and #95298 failing tooling check/proof. #94781 and #94855 should remain canonical candidates pending real behavior proof and clean merge preflight.
repair_candidate.pr_body:
This is a plan-only repair artifact for live-pr-inventory-20260621T094459-015. It does not mutate GitHub.

Candidate paths:
- #94781 remains the narrow canonical Copilot missing runtime.state fix for #94516; merge requires real behavior proof and clean merge preflight.
- #94855 remains the canonical cron recovered-warning fix for #94846; merge requires real behavior proof and clean merge preflight.
- #95298 needs repair/proof because checks-node-core-tooling failed and no merge preflight is present.
- #55851 needs review-finding repairs before merge, especially transient api_error classification and test/assertion coverage.
- #64503 needs rebase/proof/semantics repair before merge; preserve ndholakia source PR credit.

Validation should include pnpm check:changed plus the targeted vitest files listed in the artifact. Run Codex /review after repairs and address every finding before any merge recommendation.

Preserve source PR credit for Marvinthebored and commit author Peetiegonzalez on #95298 if the DeepSeek reasoning fix is repaired or replaced.
Preserve source PR credit for TinyTb on #55851 if the transient error context work is repaired or replaced.
